title: Midnight Jury Selection
description: A reference-dependent quartet that fixes one prestige ensemble arrangement, then reinterprets the same cast hierarchy through seaside, winter, and gala-window festival treatments.
creative_direction: This package behaves like a true festival campaign system. Image 01 establishes the cast, spacing, gaze hierarchy, and luxury-poster grammar; images 02-04 must preserve those same identities and relationships while shifting location, season, and packaging tone.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Midnight Jury Selection
en.description: A reference-dependent quartet that preserves one prestige ensemble arrangement across multiple festival-poster treatments.

zh-CN.title: 午夜评审团入围系列
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的影展海报系列，在不同包装版本中保留同一批角色的层级站位与关系张力。
